description:
Specification

Product Information

Item Code:W465P187128

Product Type:General Item

Product Name:400Bar 6000PSI Fuel Injector Nozzle Tester Professional Auto Repair Tool with Dual Scale Gauge for Tractors Nozzle Pop Pressure Tester

Main Color:Black

Main Material:Steel

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):4.00

Assembled Width (in.):6.00

Assembled Height (in.):15.00

Weight (lbs.):10.00

Package Size

Length (in.):16.50

Width (in.):9.10

Height (in.):6.90

Weight (lbs.):12.10

Product Features

  • High-Pressure Testing Capability: This fuel injector nozzle tester is designed to handle pressures up to 400 Bar or 6000 PSI, ensuring precise and accurate diagnostics for your fuel system.
  • Professional-Grade Precision: Engineered for automotive professionals and enthusiasts alike, this tool delivers reliable and accurate results, making it a must-have for engine diagnostics and maintenance.
  • Versatile Application: Ideal for use with tractors and other agricultural machinery, this tester is an essential tool for maintaining and servicing farm equipment efficiently.
  • Precise Performance Testing: Accurately test fuel injector nozzles to identify and address performance issues in engines, ensuring optimal operation and longevity.
  • Streamlined Diagnostics: This tool simplifies the diagnostic process, saving you time and effort by quickly identifying and resolving fuel system problems.
  • Complete Accessory Kit: The injector pop tester kit comes with a 60MPa pressure gauge, handle, connection nuts in A and B types (12 x 1.5mm and 14 x 1.5mm), a 0.8L fuel cup with a filter and delivery valve. Two additional oil pipes are also included for extended testing
